brief_notes: Novel indirect approach linking subcortical structural asymmetry to functional alpha lateralization. Tables are well-organized with exact beta coefficients, p-values, AIC/BIC values, and Bayes factors. The load-dependent dissociation across thalamus, globus pallidus, and caudate is a striking finding. The 2x2 factorial design provides systematic demand variation. Model selection across all 31 regressor combinations is rigorous. Sample size of 33 limits power for condition-specific analyses as noted.
